title: Fortune or Silk Touch
description: This is a texture pack that adds a subtle visual difference to diamond and netherite tools as either a yellow or blue gem where the handle meets the head of the tool.
body:
**FORTUNE OR SILK TOUCH** is a simple texture pack that adds a small gem on diamond and netherite tools that indicates whether they have silk touch, or fortune. Made for simplicity's sake, to keep a vanilla look.

The gem, located where the handle of the tool meets the head, is either yellow for a tool with fortune, or blue for a tool with silk touch. This helps to differentiate quickly when looking through your chests.
